The discovery reveals that the interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS contains at...

science.title: Quantum Networks Unlock Stronger Tests Of Reality’s Fundamental Rules
science.description: The maximal violation of Bell inequalities is now bounded by 2√2 within mutually-commuting von Neumann algebra models, a constraint previously absent in standard quantum network analyses. This rigorous algebraic framework reveals Bell nonlocality as a structural feature of operator algebras, offering new tools to quantify quantum correlations. Such conditions regarding subalgebras may inform measurement strategies in non-relativistic quantum mechanics.
